steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “inadvertently overlook nuances” in the second sentence shows scholars disregard subtleties when they categorize authors into movements.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Discount” perfectly expresses the overlooking described—to disregard or treat something as unimportant. The other three suggest engagement or criticism rather than dismissal. That matches choice C — C is correct.
